name: Mangarahara Cichlid
conservationEfforts: Emergency aquarium rescue — only known captive fish were at London Zoo and Berlin Zoo. Successful breeding in 2013 saved the species from total extinction. Reintroduction studies underway.
description: Thought to be the world's rarest fish when captive populations dropped to just two males. A desperate search found females in Madagascar in 2013, enabling breeding to save the species.
